title: Built my own bot that trades weather markets!
author: Neither-Double190
selftext:
I built a bot that trades weather markets on Polymarket, and I’m confident it’s profitable.

It uses public weather data, compares it with market prices, and finds spots where the market is wrong or too slow to react. That’s where the edge is.

I know there are risks, but I also think I have something most people don’t have yet: a system that can react faster and more consistently to weather updates than the average trader.

So far, the results back it up, and I stand by saying it has a real profitable edge.

comments.author: eggrally
comments.body: It's too late,  they been doing this for the last year, the edge is gone.

replies.author: Neither-Double190
replies.body: People are still doing it! And the edge is still real and there. ;)

comments.author: PennyRoyalTeeHee
comments.body:
Just read an interesting article where someone was using Hermes for this.

Fascinating market to teach a model to trade on - I don’t have the resources to run Hermes, but still cool.

comments.author: ElectronicGarbage246
comments.body: When somebody comes with a bot, I always ask: if it's profitable, why don't you scale your own capital?
